meta.title: FlowSpace - Team Projects Made Simple
meta.description: The easiest way for students to work together on group projects.

hero.subtitle: FlowSpace helps student teams stay organised, share credit, and hit deadlines — together.

mission.title: Fair recognition for your
mission.goal1Desc: FlowSpace makes sure everyone's hard work counts. We keep a clear record of every task so you get the credit you deserve.
mission.goal2Desc: Our aim is to make group work easy and stress-free, bringing students together to succeed on every project.

features.title: Built for technical scholarship.
features.kanbanDesc: Easily manage your tasks with real-time updates that save automatically as you work.
features.networkDesc: Connect with other students in your classes, share resources, and build your university network.
features.syncDesc: Fast and reliable chat and file sharing that stays updated across all your devices.
features.creditDesc: We keep a safe record of your help in every project, ensuring you always get the credit you deserve.
features.progressDesc: See your group deadlines clearly and track your project's path from start to finish.
features.badgesDesc: Earn special badges and profile status based on your contributions and team achievements.
features.secureDesc: Your data is protected with modern security to keep your work and personal info safe.

pricing.title: Fuel the Mission
pricing.subtitle: Your support keeps FlowSpace running and improving. Every tier unlocks powerful tools for your team.
pricing.proDesc: Monthly mission support for serious students

faq.title: Technical FAQ
faq.subtitle: Protocols and mission statements.
faq.a1: You can support this project by upgrading to Pro (£4.99/mo) or Premium (£14.99/mo) or securing a Founder Lifetime Access for £99. Your contribution directly funds the high-performance infrastructure required for global academic excellence.
faq.a2: It is our institutional-grade security portal. It utilizes dynamic secret routes and TOTP verification to ensure that only authorized administrative nodes can access the platform's core orchestration layers.
faq.a3: We utilize multi-layer encryption and institutional audit logs. Your data is stored in the same high-security environment used by the world's leading academic institutions.
faq.a4: Of course. You're in control of your data. You can permanently delete your account and all your project info with a single click whenever you like.
faq.a5: I created FlowSpace to help student teams feel more supported and recognized during group work.

footer.tagline: Unified collaboration architecture for global academic initiatives. Designed for researchers, scholars, and institutional teams.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your FlowSpace account
